# Sprint 3.1 Baseline Model Development

**Project:** Customer Churn Prediction and Retention System
**Sprint:** Sprint 3. Modeling
**Objective:** Develop models to predict customer churn, including a baseline churn probability model, a treatment response or uplift model, and a survival model.

## Description
Develop a baseline churn probability model using the developed features.

## Deliverable
Baseline churn probability model developed
